title: Kannagi Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Rug pull involving a yield aggregator on zkSync with unverified contract and misleading audit reports

prevention.rule: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal on behalf of a user without proper verification and audit

summary: Kannagi Finance, a yield aggregator on zkSync, was rug pulled, resulting in the loss of $1.1M. The contract was unverified and the audit report was misleading, highlighting the need for thorough verification and transparent audit processes.
